Functions
fza_weapons_fnc_pylonSetOwner
Description

Updates a pylon to be on a respective turret.

Parameters
_heli

The helicopter to swap pylons for

_pylons

The pylon IDs to swap (1-indexed, number)

_turret

The turret ID to swap pylons to

Returns

Nothing

Examples

[_heli, [1], [0]] call fza_weapons_fnc_pylonSetOwner

Author

mattysmith22
